prompt: Create a square album-cover image with a moody cinematic close-up of a person wearing large black over-ear studio headphones, centered and cropped tightly so the headphones fill the left and right edges and long dark hair falls down both sides. The face is intentionally hidden by one large opaque centered square block in a warm dark brown gradient, covering most of the upper and middle portrait from near the top edge to above the title area. Use soft warm backlighting, muted cream background, dark shadows, slight vintage film grain, shallow depth of field, and an intimate late-night listening-session mood. At the bottom center, add exactly two text elements: the large elegant serif title “Velvet Signal” in pale cream/gold lettering, and directly underneath it the smaller spaced artist name “PZF”. Keep the typography refined, minimal, and centered, with the title occupying the lower third and no other text, logos, stickers, borders, or watermarks. Overall color palette: black headphones and hair, warm beige background, deep brown face-obscuring square, and soft ivory-gold typography.
